evidenceSummary: Repeated validation mismatches lack enough ledger detail to distinguish remote API delay from incorrect expected state.

proposedChange.description: Add structured validation mismatch reason, read-back source, expected state hash, observed state hash, and retry eligibility to validation ledger events.

expectedBenefit: Improve diagnosis of external validation failures and reduce unsafe retries.
risk: Additional ledger detail may expose sensitive external-state metadata; redact or hash sensitive fields.
rollbackConsideration: Disable extended validation telemetry if sensitive-field review fails.
approvalRequirement: Engineering approval is required before runtime engine code changes.
regressionWatchMetric: validation_mismatch incidents with actionable cause over the next weekly cohort
